info.title: SyncVault API
info.description:
Distributed file synchronization system with REST API.

Features:
- File management with CRUD operations
- Synchronization job management
- Storage management
- Real-time status monitoring

get.description: Check if the API is healthy and running
Get a paginated list of all files in the system

post.description: Create a new file record in the synchronization system

get.description: Get detailed information about a specific file

delete.description: Delete a file from the system

get.description: Get a list of all synchronization jobs
Get detailed information about a specific sync job

parameters.name: jobID
parameters.description: Unique identifier of the sync job

post.description: Cancel a running or pending synchronization job

parameters.name: jobID
parameters.description: Unique identifier of the sync job

get.description: Get a list of all configured storage systems
Get detailed information about a specific storage
Get connection status and health information for a storage
Get storage capacity and usage information
